Describe the visual progression from the equipment close-up to the riding environment.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a black headlamp with white 'Grivit SPORTS' text is displayed; at 6s, the camera moves along a paved path lined with bare trees; at 12s, bicycle handlebars and a dark sleeve appear in the frame; at 18s, a building structure becomes visible in the background on the right side.

question: Describe the changing text overlays and environmental details observed during the movement.
canonical_answer: At 2s, orange text reading 'AC 410 Head St' overlays the headlamp view; at 6s, the text updates to 'AC 410 Head Strap 1080p30fps' as movement starts; at 8s, a distant cyclist rides ahead on the path; at 18s, brown fallen leaves cover the ground beside the paved surface.
